title: Property Consultant - Mahagun Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mahagun Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!
